text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of Symboli Rudolf's races have been run. With
seven crowns to her name, she has proven beyond
all doubt that she is truly the Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The weight hangs heavy, but she is strong enough
to bear it. We both celebrate the fulfillment of
our shared dream.
